UpdateSourceArgs: -c "CFG='{{$FullBaseDir}}LMPServer-linux-x64/Config'; FILE=\"$CFG/GeneralSettings.xml\"; mkdir -p \"$CFG\"; if [ ! -f \"$FILE\" ]; then printf '%s\n' '<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"utf-8\"?>' '<GeneralSettingsDefinition xmlns:xsi=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance\" xmlns:xsd=\"http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema\">' '  <ServerName>Luna Server</ServerName>' '  <Description>Luna Server Description</Description>' '  <CountryCode></CountryCode>' '  <WebsiteText>LMP</WebsiteText>' '  <Website>lunamultiplayer.com</Website>' '  <Password></Password>' '  <AdminPassword></AdminPassword>' '  <ServerMotd>Hi %Name%!' 'Welcome to %ServerName%.' 'Online players: %PlayerCount%</ServerMotd>' '  <PrintMotdInChat>false</PrintMotdInChat>' '  <MaxPlayers>20</MaxPlayers>' '  <MaxUsernameLength>15</MaxUsernameLength>' '  <AutoDekessler>0.5</AutoDekessler>' '  <AutoNuke>0</AutoNuke>' '  <Cheats>true</Cheats>' '  <AllowSackKerbals>false</AllowSackKerbals>' '  <ConsoleIdentifier>Server</ConsoleIdentifier>' '  <GameDifficulty>Normal</GameDifficulty>' '  <GameMode>Career</GameMode>' '  <ModControl>true</ModControl>' '  <NumberOfAsteroids>5</NumberOfAsteroids>' '  <NumberOfComets>5</NumberOfComets>' '  <TerrainQuality>High</TerrainQuality>' '  <SafetyBubbleDistance>100</SafetyBubbleDistance>' '  <MaxVesselParts>200</MaxVesselParts>' '</GeneralSettingsDefinition>' > \"$FILE\"; fi; sed -i 's/encoding=\"utf-16\"/encoding=\"utf-8\"/I' \"$FILE\""

-c "from pathlib import Path; p=Path('{{$FullBaseDir}}LMPServer-linux-x64/Config/GeneralSettings.xml'); raw=p.read_bytes(); text=raw.decode('utf-16') if raw[:2] in (b'\xff\xfe',b'\xfe\xff') else raw.decode('utf-8-sig'); text=text.replace('encoding=\"utf-8\"','encoding=\"utf-16\"'); text=text.replace('encoding=\"utf-16\"','encoding=\"utf-16\"'); p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-16')"
